name: Operation Ghost Script: The Fileless Phish
description:
Scenario Overview

Our Security Operations Center (SOC) recently escalated an incident (INC-2026-9500) originating from the endpoint DESKTOP-FIN01 assigned to user asmith. Initial triage suggests a sophisticated fileless malware attack stemming from a seemingly harmless Office document.

The adversary successfully bypassed traditional file-based defenses by "Living off the Land" (LotL). They utilized native Windows utilities to execute obfuscated code, establish a persistent foothold, and initiate periodic beaconing to an external Command and Control (C2) server.

Your Mission

You have been provided with the correlated SIEM/EDR alert logs in JSON format. As the lead Incident Responder, you must analyze the alerts, reconstruct the attack kill chain, and answer the following:

  • Initial Access & Execution: What was the obfuscated payload executed by the malicious Word document?
  • Persistence: How did the attacker maintain access without dropping executable files on the disk?
  • Command & Control: Identify the malicious C2 IP address and the frequency of the beacons.
  • Triage: Differentiate the true positive indicators of compromise from benign background noise.

Download the fileless_phishing_scenario.json artifact to begin your investigation. Good luck, analyst!
